appraisal_events.evidence: « Saviez-vous qui est partisan enragé de Dreyfus ? ... Mon neveu Robert de Saint-Loup ! ... au Jockey ... cela a été une levée de boucliers, un véritable tollé. »
appraisal_events.explanation: The Jockey Club’s outcry, reported by the duc, discredits Saint-Loup locally because of his association with Dreyfusism, jeopardizing his reception as he is about to be presented.

status_effects.explanation: Within the elite Jockey Club context, Saint-Loup suffers a local loss of standing due to the backlash against his Dreyfusard stance.
